name: Lambratis Andros (Easter Lamb or Kid Andros S
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the lamb by seasoning with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
2. Cut the lemons in half and squeeze the juice into a bowl.
3. Melt the butter and olive oil together until fully combined.
4. Place the lamb on a cutting board and pour the lemon juice mixture over it.
5. Pour the melted butter and olive oil mixture over the lamb, ensuring even coating.
6. Allow the lamb to marinate for at least 2 hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
7. When ready to cook, remove the lamb from the marinade and pat dry with paper towels.
8. Place the lamb on a cutting board and season with additional salt and pepper.
9. Cook the lamb according to your preferred method (roasting, grilling, etc.) until desired internal temperature is reached.
10. Let the lamb rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
